origin.name: New Zealand
origin.death_registration: Births Deaths and Marriages New Zealand
origin.post_mortem_trigger: Unexpected, unnatural, violent, or deaths where cause is uncertain. New Zealand coroner involvement is broader than UK.
origin.key_document: New Zealand death certificate (Births Deaths and Marriages, in English)
origin.source: FCDO New Zealand travel advice, updated 2025; British High Commission Wellington guidance

destinations.name: United Kingdom

airlines.name: Air New Zealand
airlines.routes: AKL to LHR (via SIN or LAX)

special_rules: Documentation is in English throughout. No translation required.
New Zealand coroner has broader jurisdiction than UK. Unexpected deaths, unnatural deaths, and deaths where cause is uncertain are all referred.
Cargo transit to UK takes 30-40 hours via Singapore or Los Angeles.
destinations.dest_reception: The UK funeral director takes custody at the cargo terminal. New Zealand documentation is in English and typically accepted directly. The coroner for the district is notified.
destinations.dest_consular_note: FCDO 24-hour emergency line: +44 (0)20 7008 5000. British High Commission Wellington and consulates in Auckland and Christchurch can register the death and advise.
destinations.seo_title: New Zealand to UK Repatriation: Guidance for British Families
destinations.seo_description: Someone has died in New Zealand. Repatriation to the UK takes 10-21 days. NZ documentation and long-haul cargo flights explained. Contact us 24/7.

destinations.name: Ireland

airlines.name: Air New Zealand
airlines.routes: AKL to DUB (via LHR or SIN)

special_rules: Large Irish-New Zealand diaspora. Well-established corridor.
Irish Embassy in Wellington handles consular matters.
Documentation in English. No translation required.
destinations.dest_reception: The Irish funeral director takes custody at the cargo terminal. Documentation in English and typically accepted directly. The Coroner is notified.
destinations.dest_consular_note: Department of Foreign Affairs emergency line: +353 1 408 2000. The Irish Embassy in Wellington can register the death and advise.
destinations.seo_title: New Zealand to Ireland: Funeral Repatriation Guidance
destinations.seo_description: Someone has died in New Zealand and needs to come home to Ireland. 10-21 days. Documentation in English. All handled. Contact us 24/7.
